title: PayPal Expected To Beat Earnings Estimates: What To Know Ahead Of Q2 Release
text: PayPal was expected to beat earnings estimates for Q2 2024 with Earnings ESP of 2.96%. Expected to post quarterly earnings of $0.96 per share. Actual results showed non-GAAP earnings of $1.19 per share, up 36% year-over-year, surpassing estimates by 23.96%. Net revenues of $7.9 billion grew 8% reported basis and 9% currency-neutral basis. Generated $1.4 billion free cash flow and returned $1.5 billion to shareholders.
